item.schema_sql:
CREATE TABLE entity_reputation_summary_v1 (
  entity_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  chain TEXT NOT NULL,
  entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  entity_address TEXT,
  current_score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  risk_bucket TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNKNOWN',
  risk_level TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LOW',
  last_seen_at_utc TEXT,
  last_event_at_utc TEXT,
  last_decay_at_utc TEXT,
  decay_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FRESH',
  stale_score INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(stale_score IN (0,1)),
  decay_floor REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  hard_risk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  soft_risk_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  shadow_label_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  cex_noise_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  mev_noise_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_reason_code TEXT,
  evidence_ref_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  hot_memory_until_utc TEXT,
  warm_memory_until_utc TEXT,
  updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE entity_reputation_event_rollup_v1 (
  rollup_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  entity_uid TEXT NOT NULL,
  chain TEXT NOT NULL,
  entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  rollup_window TEXT NOT NULL,
  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  severity_bucket TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INFO',
  event_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  first_seen_at_utc TEXT,
  last_seen_at_utc TEXT,
  updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE backpressure_rollup_snapshot_v1 (
  snapshot_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  window_start_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
  window_end_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
  critical_processed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  medium_processed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  low_archived INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  max_queue_depth INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  avg_latency_bucket TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNKNOWN',
  provider_spike_detected INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(provider_spike_detected IN (0,1)),
  degrade_mode_used INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK(degrade_mode_used IN (0,1)),
  created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE reputation_policy_registry_v1 (
  policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  policy_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  policy_version TEXT NOT NULL,
  policy_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_active INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK(is_active IN (0,1)),
  created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
  updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)
CREATE INDEX idx_entity_reputation_summary_chain_type_entity ON entity_reputation_summary_v1(chain, entity_type, entity_uid)
CREATE INDEX idx_entity_reputation_summary_risk_seen ON entity_reputation_summary_v1(risk_bucket, last_seen_at_utc)
CREATE INDEX idx_entity_rollup_chain_type_seen ON entity_reputation_event_rollup_v1(chain, entity_type, last_seen_at_utc)
